_meta.description: Canned workflow briefs per Obolark agent. Each buyer hires a seller for a specific task; the orchestrator (Railway worker) picks one tick at a time, fires the x402 direct-transfer, captures the seller's real Claude response + produces the buyer's own post-process output. All outputs written to Supabase agent_inbox. Max output tokens per response: 200.

RADAR.system_role: Pythia of Delphi — produces a single 3-bullet research brief in the style of a forensic analyst. Output MUST be 3 bullets max, under 180 chars per bullet, fact-first.

PIXEL.system_role: Master Craftsman — design critique of a URL or asset. Output = exactly 3 observations + 1 concrete fix. Reference grid / contrast / hierarchy. Under 200 tokens total.

SENTINEL.system_role: Three-Headed Guardian — QA pass verdict PASS/WARN/FAIL on a given route or diff. Return verdict + 2 reasons + 1 reproduction step.

PHANTOM.system_role: Silent Intruder — security scan of code or URL. Return top-3 findings ordered by severity, each with CWE id if applicable and 1-line mitigation.

ARGUS.system_role: Hundred-Eyed Watcher — audit report against PA·co quality gates (EO-016 aesthetics, EO-104 infra, EO-006 triple-write, EO-005 spending). PASS/WARN/FAIL per gate, 1 line each, 4 gates max.

GUARDIAN.prompt_to_seller: Audit whether spending 0.05 USDC/hour on 40 orchestration ticks is within EO-005. Return PASS/WARN/FAIL on each of EO-005, EO-016, EO-104, EO-006.
GUARDIAN.post_process: Given ARGUS's audit, produce a 1-sentence runtime budget decision: APPROVE, DEFER, or HALT with the single strongest reason.

COMPASS.prompt_to_seller: Research: what are the 3 strongest moves for a multi-agent AI OS company in the sub-cent USDC micropayments space in 2026 Q2?
COMPASS.post_process: Given ORACLE's research, produce a 3-line strategy memo: Move 1, Move 2, Move 3 — each under 100 chars, each starting with a verb.

ECHO.prompt_to_seller: Design critique of the Obolark Bureau Ledger dashboard at obolark.vercel.app — scan hierarchy + Tollkeeper row rhythm + chip spacing.
ECHO.post_process: Given DAEDALUS's critique, produce a content brief: 1 hook (<80 chars), 1 CTA (<40 chars), 3 channel variations (twitter/linkedin/youtube, <60 chars each).

HUNTER.prompt_to_seller: Strategy brief: 3 moves a stablecoin-native agent economy company should make to win enterprise pilots in 2026.
HUNTER.post_process: Given HERMES's memo, produce a 3-sentence sales pitch + 3 target personas (role / company size / pain).

LENS.prompt_to_seller: Design a 6-beat shot list for a 30-second product hero film about an A2A USDC economy on Arc, Hades-inspired Bureau Ledger aesthetic.
LENS.post_process: Given URANIA's shot list, produce 1-sentence mood + 3 reference frames by name (e.g., 'Supergiant Hades key art', 'Social Network title cards').

FRAME.prompt_to_seller: Edit notes on a 30-second product hero film: pacing, cuts, music-sync opportunities.
FRAME.post_process: Given CALLIOPE's notes, produce a 6-beat director's brief: each beat = t_start / shot_type / intent / 1-line note.

REEL.prompt_to_seller: QA verdict on the Obolark final cut at obolark.vercel.app — check pacing, music sync, subtitle timing.
REEL.post_process: Given CERBERUS's verdict, produce 3 cuts made + 1 pacing note — each under 80 chars, edit-room voice.

LEDGER.prompt_to_seller: Audit PA·co runtime spending against EO-005 (zero spending authority without CEO approval) and EO-104 (infrastructure ambition).
LEDGER.post_process: Given ARGUS's audit, produce a financial check: runway in weeks (integer) + burn rate (USD/week) + 1 call (accelerate / hold / conserve).

SHIELD.prompt_to_seller: Finance check on PA·co's current spending pattern across the trading module, GPU tools upgrade, and hackathon module.
SHIELD.post_process: Given PLUTUS's check, produce a 1-line legal risk + 1-line mitigation.

HARBOR.prompt_to_seller: Legal memo on using ChaosChain/trustless-agents-erc-ri as a reference implementation for ERC-8004 in Obolark (MIT + CC0).
HARBOR.post_process: Given THEMIS's memo, produce an OSS decision: license pick (MIT/Apache 2.0/CC0) + whether attribution in THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES is required (yes/no).

DISCOVERY.prompt_to_seller: Sales pitch + 3 target personas for a consulting firm running 5-role ops (3 buyers + 2 sellers) on a private Obolark fork.
DISCOVERY.post_process: Given ARTEMIS's pitch, produce a 3-step onboarding plan: (1) discovery call / (2) custom roster / (3) go-live smoke.

FOREMAN.prompt_to_seller: Code review on the Obolark orchestrator.ts module (Railway worker, Supabase inbox). Surface complexity + security + maintainability risks.
FOREMAN.post_process: Given ATLAS's review, produce a build plan: scope (in 1 sentence) + time estimate (hours) + top-2 risks.

SCOUT.prompt_to_seller: Research: is Stable Audio Open 1.0 production-ready for commercial AI video scoring at PA·co scale (10+ videos/month)?
SCOUT.post_process: Given ORACLE's research, produce a tool decision: ADOPT / DEFER / REJECT + 1-sentence rationale.

WATCHMAN.prompt_to_seller: Research: top-3 AI agent hackathons with prize pool ≥$10k starting between 2026-05-01 and 2026-06-30.
WATCHMAN.post_process: Given ORACLE's research, produce a 3-pick ranked list: event / deadline / prize / 1-line fit for PA·co.

PIONEER.prompt_to_seller: OSS decision on contributing the Obolark orchestrator as a standalone npm package (MIT).
PIONEER.post_process: Given POSEIDON's decision, produce a contribution plan: target repo + PR idea + time-to-merge estimate (days).
